# Vendor Jobs

## Overview
Pekerjaan maintenance yang di-assign ke vendor.

## File Location
- `src/pages/vendor/Jobs.tsx` - Halaman jobs

## Database Tables
- `maintenance_requests` - Request dengan vendor assignment
- `maintenance_updates` - Updates
- `maintenance_reviews` - Reviews

## Features
- ✅ View assigned jobs
- ✅ Accept job
- ✅ Start job
- ✅ Complete job
- ✅ Add updates
- ✅ Upload photos
- ✅ View reviews

## Implementation Status
| Feature | Status |
|---------|--------|
| View | ✅ Complete |
| Accept | ✅ Complete |
| Start | ✅ Complete |
| Complete | ✅ Complete |
| Updates | ✅ Complete |

## Job Status
- `assigned` - Ditugaskan
- `accepted` - Diterima
- `in_progress` - Dikerjakan
- `completed` - Selesai

## Related Components
- Maintenance components
